ChangeRequest.name: Removing the attribute `Long debt security position`.`Default status`
ChangeRequest.comment:
<!-- See: documentation on [Issues in GitLab](https://gitlab.sofa.dev/sdd-bird-team/bird-logical-data-model/-/wikis/Issues-in-GitLab) -->
### Overview
According to the CRR, Article 178 the `Default status` can - under certain conditions - be assessed on an individual level. We believe that these conditions, especially the assignment to the `Retail exposure class` do not apply for `Long debt security position`(s) and therefore we suggest to remove the attribute `Long debt security position`.`Default status`.
### Contact person
dominik.lin-ully@oenb.at, Valentina.Murano@bancaditalia.it
### Description of change request
Remove the attribute `Long debt security position`.`Default status`.
### Summary of impacted LDM objects/attributes
* `Long debt security position`.`Default status`
### Forward Engineering considerations _[Other considerations]_
### Before closing checklist - [ ] Assignee for review - [ ] Assignee to close - [ ] Any other actions to be taken
